creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Firefox >= 51 requires Cargo to build with Rust support. The option to disable it will[1] go away sometime this year. If we leave things as is www/firefox may become amd64-only, even losing recently gained aarch64 support.

[1] https://bugzilla.mozilla.org/show_bug.cgi?id=1284816
